message:
feat(visual-fx): implement StackedFx compositor for multi-layer backdrops (bd-l8x9.2.5)

- StackedFx: BackdropFx implementation that stacks multiple effect layers
- BlendMode: Over, Additive, Multiply, Screen blend modes
- FxLayer: Wrapper with opacity and blend mode configuration
- Single-pass output: all layers composited in one final loop
- Grow-only buffer reuse: no per-frame allocations in steady state
- 14 unit tests covering composition, blending, and no-alloc behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
